core_payload.content:
# Symphony

## 1. Role
Symphony is the orchestration layer for N1Hub engineering work. It now routes that orchestration through four bounded sub-hubs so assignment intake, live session fabric, workflow safety, and run observability remain explicit instead of collapsing into one 20-link parent hub.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `assignment-intake` owns tracker-fed work discovery, workspace entry, swarm-fed assignments, and capsule-job intake before live execution begins.
- `live-session-fabric` owns the daemonized session substrate, harness protocol, and continuity surfaces that keep one run alive inside one workspace.
- `workflow-safety` owns repo workflow law, approval and sandbox posture, night-shift gating, and the testing or security guardrails around execution.
- `run-observability` owns run attempts, retry state, and observability surfaces that explain what happened, what failed, and what needs intervention next.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent Symphony hub keeps only the top-level relationship to N1Hub, To Dig Deep, Workspace, the Symphony project envelope, and the four orchestration sub-hubs. Detailed runtime routing now flows through those sub-hubs so Symphony remains a legible execution contract instead of a flat registry of every session, retry, policy, and status surface.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony now acts as a bounded routing hub for four explicit orchestration surfaces: assignment intake, live session fabric, workflow safety, and run observability. The parent keeps only top-level ties to N1Hub, To Dig Deep, Workspace, the Symphony project envelope, and the four sub-hubs. This makes execution easier to inspect because intake, live runtime continuity, workflow law, safety posture, retries, and operator evidence no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule. The result is a clearer orchestration contract for how repository work enters, runs, and reports back.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Refactored Symphony into four bounded sub-hubs so assignment intake, live session fabric, workflow safety, and run observability no longer collapse into a 20-link parent hub.
